title: Attack on Lupin
overview: A certain world is surrounded by huge walls. Then all of a sudden Lupin over 30m invades there... Yoshihiko and Kuniko are trembling in fear... And Lupin attacks Kuniko's house! Now Lupin steals someone?!

title: Saito Lupin
overview: Lupin lived as a son-in-law with the Saito family, an opinion leader in the region that continued from the Jomon period. The Saito family had an anomaly where everything in the house began to disappear, but the owner eventually wanted Lupin to take over the house...

title: Lupiky
overview: When the habit of visiting three times in my life gets worse... Yeah, that's Lupiky. Such Lupiky also visits Fujimoto. Without knowing, Fujimoto, who steals things inside the school, begins to show symptoms of Lupiky more and more.

title: Melting Man Lupin
overview: A creature that is neither a monster nor a youkai was picked up by Gregor. Lupin, Fujiko, and Jigen, when they grow up, go out into the city and start working... Eventually Gregor's house overflowed with gold...

title: Tropical Lupin
overview: A tropical Lupin with a very strong power off the Philippines seems to land in Honshu tonight. Takeshi and Zenigata decided to take measures in preparation for Lupin landing... Is it possible to pass safely with the wind and rain increasing?!

title: Steal in the Countryside!
overview: Lupin III stole in a certain village in the Shimane prefecture. Lupin the 3rd, calling out to the villagers in search of a house to steal. Grandfather Tomiko heard about the situation and seems to let you steal Lupin...?

title: Washing Lupin III
overview: Tommy comes to the forest in search of her girlfriend Cathy and a raccoon. Then he saw the washed Lupin in a trap! Tommy decided to bring back the washed Lupin, but the wild washed Lupin couldn't be quiet...

title: My Neighbor Lupin
overview: A truck loaded with household belongings traveled on a peaceful country road. Mazurka and his family were about to start a new life here. However, when he arrived at his new house, there was a Western-style house next door where the Lupin gang lived...

title: Blackholepin
overview: The title is a portmanteau of ブラックホール (Burakkuhōru, Black Hole) and ルパン (Rupan, Lupin), this is lost when translated into other languages.

title: Conclusion from Lupin Sensei
overview: Despite the important time of taking an examination, a teacher with a title of inexperienced and great thief came as a homeroom teacher. A very friendly and unique Lupin teacher. One day at such a school, a wallet theft case occurs...
